summary: Iteration 50 - Bug fix verification for PlanoInspecaoCreate (ativo_id optional), normalizeError field names, and supervisor full-visibility. Backend: 12/12 pytest cases PASS. Frontend: manual Playwright flow PASS — Planos de Inspeção page loads, 'Novo Plano' modal exposes ALL six required fields (Nome, Tipo do Plano, Tipo de Equipamento, Disciplina, Vincular a Ativo, Descrição), plan creation with 3 items succeeds ('Plano criado!' toast), edit view maps perguntas -> itens correctly (10 items loaded for existing plan). Supervisor now sees ALL 5 OS (same as PCM/master), while mecânico still sees 1 (mecanica) and operador still sees 2 (producao+civil).

issues: Recharts console warnings: 'width(-1) height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' — cosmetic, not blocking.

React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Caused by Emergent dev instrumentation (data-ve-dynamic spans) wrapping option contents. Doesn't affect functionality but pollutes console. If it appears in production build too, wrap the option label in a template string only (already is `{a.tag} - {a.nome}`) — likely a dev-only artifact.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py:967-973 create_plano_inspecao stores both `tipo` and `categoria` (categoria = tipo if not provided) — duplicate storage. Consider dropping `categoria` in new writes and only reading it for backward-compat.

server.py:996-1010 update_plano_inspecao only supports updating `nome` and `perguntas`. The PUT endpoint IGNORES tipo/ativo_id/disciplina/frequencia/responsavel_id/status/versao changes from PlanoInspecaoUpdate — inconsistent with the model. Frontend handleSave (App.js:6576) sends full payload expecting these to be updated; they will be silently dropped. Bug: editing a plan cannot change its ativo/tipo/disciplina.

App.js:6554-6583 handleSave payload maps `tolerancia_max` -> `limite_normal` on line 6568 (`limite_normal: it.tolerancia_max || it.limite_normal`). This is semantically wrong — tolerancia_max is an upper bound, limite_normal is a target midpoint. Field mapping should be separated.

deps.py:150-153 user_has_full_visibility now includes 'supervisor'. Correct per spec, but note that this also means `check_pcm_or_admin` (deps.py:114-117) still EXCLUDES supervisor from POSTing to stock/spares/templates — so supervisor has FULL READ but no write. Confirmed by design; document in the RBAC matrix.

App.js:6467 form default `disciplina: ''` sends empty string to backend if not selected. Backend PlanoInspecaoCreate.disciplina is Optional[str] so it accepts '' but persists ''. Better: send null when empty (already handled via `form.disciplina || null` in payload line 6564 — OK).
App.js dashboard renders Recharts with parent container width -1: check that `ResponsiveContainer` has an explicit min-height or the parent element has a stable size on first paint.
test_credentials: All 4 requested credentials work (master, sup_mec, mecanico, operador). File /app/memory/test_credentials.md is accurate.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed/test-users re-applied. Created 5 TEST_ITER50_* plans via pytest fixture — teardown deletes them. Created 1 TEST_UI_ITER50_* plan via Playwright UI — manually deleted via API after test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 confirms: (1) PlanoInspecaoCreate.ativo_id is Optional and generic plans persist with ativo_id=null; (2) 422 responses expose the field name in detail[].loc — frontend normalizeError can extract it; (3) Bulk perguntas up to 100 items work in a single POST (~<1s); (4) Supervisor role now returns from build_visibility_query with the base org filter only (deps.py:203) — verified via GET /api/ordens-servico and /api/dashboard/stats. IMPORTANT — Discovered code issue during review: PUT /api/planos-inspecao/{id} only updates 'nome' and 'perguntas' (server.py:996-1010) even though PlanoInspecaoUpdate model exposes many more fields. Editing tipo/ativo_id/disciplina/frequencia from UI will silently fail. Not blocking current bug fix but worth flagging to main agent for a future iteration.
rca of the issue: Original bug: React frontend was submitting POST /api/planos-inspecao without 'ativo_id', which was mandatory in Pydantic. Backend returned 422 with `loc=['body','ativo_id']` and generic detail 'Field required' — frontend normalizeError swallowed the loc and showed only 'Field required' without a field name. Fix chain (all verified): backend made ativo_id Optional[str]=None (models.py:474) → backend still returns proper 422 with loc[] for other missing fields → frontend normalizeError parses detail[].loc to show 'Campo \"Nome\" é obrigatório'. Supervisor full-visibility fix: deps.py:203 includes 'supervisor' in the full-visibility group (same branch as admin/pcm/gerente), so build_visibility_query returns only the base org filter. Confirmed via pytest — sup_mec now sees 5 OS instead of 1.
